tags.name: `mc-number-stepper`
tags.description:
Purpose: A number input field with increment and decrement buttons, for inputting numeric values.
Category: Forms
When to use: When you need a numeric input field with stepper controls.
When not to use: When you need a simple text input field.
Works with components: mc-accordion-item, mc-card, mc-dialog, mc-drawer, mc-modal, mc-popover, mc-step-indicator-item, mc-table, mc-tabs
Alternative component names:  Number Input, Numeric Stepper, Quantity Selector, Numeric Input Field, Stepper Control

Events:

  * `input` {`InputEvent`} - 

Slots:

  * ``label`` {} - The label HTML to use for the mc-number-stepper.

  * ``hint`` {} - The hint HTML to use for the mc-number-stepper.

  * ``errormessage`` {} - The errormessage HTML to use for the mc-number-stepper.

Attributes:

  * `min` {`Min`} - 

  * `max` {`Max`} - 

  * `step` {`Step`} - 

  * `minuslabel` {`string`} - Label for the minus button.

  * `pluslabel` {`string`} - Label for the plus button.

Properties:

  * `maxdisabled` {`boolean`} - 

  * `mindisabled` {`boolean`} - 

  * `type` {`string`} - 

  * `inputmode` {`string`} - 

  * `pattern` {`string`} - 

  * `min` {`Min`} - 

  * `max` {`Max`} - 

  * `step` {`Step`} - 

  * `minuslabel` {`string`} - Label for the minus button.

  * `pluslabel` {`string`} - Label for the plus button.

attributes.name: minuslabel
attributes.description:
`minuslabel` {`string`} - Label for the minus button.

Property: minuslabel

Default: minus

attributes.name: pluslabel
attributes.description:
`pluslabel` {`string`} - Label for the plus button.

Property: pluslabel

Default: plus
